name: Little Falls Bus Corp
fmcsa_status: Active (Not Authorized for interstate for-hire; intrastate active)
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations / third-party business directories (D&B, Buzzfile, Manta)
notes: FMCSA carrier is registered as 'LITTLE FALLS FONDA BUS CORP' at exactly the same address (7893 State Highway 5, St Johnsville NY 13452) and same phone (518-568-2684) as the input 'Little Falls Bus Corp' - clearly the same school bus operator with a slightly different legal/registered name (likely covers Little Falls + Fonda routes). USDOT MCS-150 form filing dated 04/19/2021 - carrier registration is flagged outdated. Listed on NYSDOT Performance-Based Bus Safety Program Preferred Operators (SFY 2022-23) and Good Operators (SFY 2023-24) lists, confirming active school bus operation. Founded ~2000 per business directories. Robert Brown listed as President. Power units = 2 on FMCSA filing likely understates true operating fleet (NYSDOT operator profiles indicate larger fleet) - this happens often when only a subset of vehicles is reported on MCS-150 for intrastate filings. Annual revenue est. $1.1M, ~45 employees per Buzzfile/D&B (older estimates).

name: Big Apple Bus Inc
registry_source: Searched: FMCSA SAFER (name+keyword), OpenCorporates NY, OpenGovNY, NYC OPT vendor portal (auth required), NY DOS Public Inquiry
notes: No confident match found in FMCSA SAFER for 'Big Apple Bus Inc' at 141 Lawrence Ave, Inwood NY 11096. Similar-named carriers (BIG APPLE TRANSPORT NY INC USDOT 2250659; BIG APPLE II TRANSPORTATION CORP USDOT 1093115 at Long Island City; BIG APPLE TRANSPORT LLC 3022447) do not match the Inwood/141 Lawrence Ave address. NY Transportation Partners Inc shares the 141 Lawrence Ave mailing address but is a different entity. The principal school-bus carrier at 25 Wanser Ave Inwood is Independent Coach Corp - not a match. No NY DOS entity found under exact name 'Big Apple Bus Inc' in searches. Carrier may operate primarily under intrastate (NYSDOT) registration without a USDOT, or may be small/charter-only or have a different DBA. Manual lookup recommended via NY DOS public inquiry and NYC OPT vendor list (login required).

name: Freeman Bus Corp
carrier_operation: Motor Passenger Common Carrier (interstate authority revoked); operates as school bus/charter intrastate
fmcsa_address: 1067 MARBLE STREET, WATERTOWN, NY 13601 (HQ); operates yard at 32780 Route 11, Philadelphia, NY 13673
fmcsa_status: USDOT Active but Operating Authority/MC Inactive (authority revoked 04/17/2023); intrastate operations continue
officers: Freeman family (Clarence Henry Freeman founded predecessor 1925; incorporated as Freeman Bus Corporation 1952)
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER, NY DOS, company website freemanbuscorp.com, BBB profile (66005519), watertownny.com chamber listing
notes: The input 'Freeman Bus Corp' at 32780 Route 11, Philadelphia NY 13673 is a satellite garage of Freeman Bus Corporation (USDOT 528221), which is headquartered at 1067 Marble Street, Watertown NY 13601. Same Jefferson County NY territory. Company is family-owned since Clarence Henry Freeman started in 1925 (as a driver for Old Colonial Motor Coach Lines, predecessor to Greyhound); independent operation began 1935 leasing Dexter-Sackets Harbor routes; incorporated as Freeman Bus Corporation in 1952. Operates school bus contracts (Indian River CSD among others - First Student also lists 32780 Route 11), charter, limo and airport shuttle. MC-167488 authority revoked April 17, 2023; FMCSA snapshot indicates carrier is inactive for interstate for-hire but power units / driver count still on file (2 PU / 15 drivers - clearly only the interstate-charter subset; total school bus fleet larger ~8+ buses per BBB / industry listings). Phone at Philadelphia NY yard: (315) 642-0413; HQ: Watertown NY.

name: Mckinley & City Line Bus Co
registry_source: Searched: FMCSA SAFER (name+keyword variations: MCKINLEY, MCKINLEY CITY LINE BUS, MCKINLEY AND CITY LINE), OpenCorporates PA, PA Bureau of Corporations, PA PUC Motor Carrier, Philadelphia DOR business license search
notes: No confident match found in FMCSA SAFER, OpenCorporates, or PA Department of State business entity search for 'Mckinley & City Line Bus Co' at 4341 N 7th St, Philadelphia PA 19140. Multiple name variants tried (with/without ampersand, 'and', spacing). Address 4341 N 7th St is in the Logan neighborhood (zip 19140) - a residential/small-commercial area in North Philadelphia. Company may be a very small/private school bus contractor without an FMCSA registration (Philadelphia school bus contractors operating only intrastate within PA can be PA PUC-only registered without USDOT). Could also be a defunct legacy operator. Manual lookup in PA DOS Business Entity Search (file.dos.pa.gov), PA PUC certificated carrier database, and Philadelphia Department of Records business licenses required for authoritative match.

name: Kauffman Bus Svc Inc
fmcsa_status: Active (USDOT active, no out-of-service date); Not Authorized for interstate for-hire
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 907104); company Facebook page (KauffmanBus); PA DOS Bureau of Corporations (not directly queried)
notes: Address from FMCSA (1565 Jerusalem Road, Mechanicsburg PA 17050) matches input address exactly. Phone (717) 737-3396. School bus operator currently hiring drivers per Facebook page; serves Cumberland Valley area schools with free CDL training program. 83 power units and 61 drivers indicates substantial fleet. PA DOS entity registry incorporation date and officer info not retrieved in this pass (PA business search not directly queried for this company); recommend PA Department of State Business Entity Search confirm officers and incorporation date. Founding date estimated >25 years ago based on USDOT 907104 issuance (typically late 1990s/2000s).
